offer: For restaurant finance teams processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate sales tax reporting causes compliance penalties. We provide automated daily sales tax reports instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.
problem: Inaccurate sales tax reporting leads to compliance penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant finance teams
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant finance teams with demo video
Community forums where finance teams share tools
try_it: Let users try daily sales tax report generation with 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing invoice data
